name: Apocalypse Breaker
explicitMods:
Triggers Level 20 Spectral Spirits when Equipped
+3 to maximum number of Spectral Spirits
Adds 18 to 32 Cold Damage to Spells

typeLine: Abecedarian's Bismuth Flask of the Rainbow
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Skull Coil
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 2 Cold Damage to Attacks

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Khatal's Geyser
implicitMods: Grants Level 21 Purity of Elements Skill
explicitMods:
Increases and Reductions to Effect of Flasks applied to you
also applies to Effect of Arcane Surge on you at 203% of their value
You have Arcane Surge during Effect of any Mana Flask

Mana Flask Effects are not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled
Mana Flask Effects do not Queue
flavourText: "In a time of great need, the tale-man sacrificed his very
body to bring forth the waters of victory and salvation."

name: Pandemonium Nails
implicitMods: Inflict Cold Exposure on Hit, applying -13% to Cold Resistance
25% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
fracturedMods: 47% increased Damage with Hits against Chilled Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff adding cold damage to spells and attacks. If you shatter an enemy, this skill will cause them to explode and deal AoE cold damage to enemies near them. This damage is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Attack Cold Damage
Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Spell Cold Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 100
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
19% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
99% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Ynda's Stand
explicitMods: Gain Ward instead of 70% of Armour and Evasion Rating from Equipped Body Armour
flavourText: When all else was burning and overrun,
she held the bridge to the very end.

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Olroth's Charge
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds when Ward Breaks
flavourText: Where others would retreat when vulnerable,
Olroth the Gallant fought deeper into battle.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will be triggered when your Ward breaks. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 22% less Spell Damage
Supported Spells have 5% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate per 100 Ward
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Trigger Supported Spells when your Ward Breaks
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Prove yourself! Are you a knave, or a knight?
I shall know by the strength of your blows!"

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: 100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Cold, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their cold resistance and giving them a chance to be frozen when hit.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -37% to Cold Resistance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +25% chance to Freeze
Freezes on Cursed enemies have 20% increased Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, making them more vulnerable to Critical Strikes. Killing the cursed enemy will grant life and mana, and a power charge. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have a 100% chance to grant a Power Charge when slain
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +1.5% to Critical Strike Chance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier
Cursed enemies grant 623 Life when Killed
Cursed enemies grant 82 Mana when Killed
Cursed Enemies have a 5% chance to grant a Power Charge when Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Torment Cloak
implicitMods: Flasks gain a Charge every 3 seconds

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a slow-moving projectile that pierces through enemies, dealing cold damage.
explicitMods: Projectiles that have Pierced deal 20% more Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Launches shards of ice in rapid succession. After travelling a short distance they change to a second form, which moves much faster and pierces through enemies.
explicitMods: Second form has 600% increased Critical Strike Chance
Second form has +90% to Critical Strike Multiplier
Second form has 300% more Projectile Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that deal damage with hits and have no reservation. Cannot support arcane skills, Brand skills, Orb skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills gain Added Cold Damage equal to 28% of Reserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills gain Base Mana Cost equal to 5% of Reserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills deal 11% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Her understanding of the Atlas was not innate. The
more committed she became to understanding it,
the more the knowledge weighed on her.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell will track how much mana you spend on it, granting a buff when the total mana spent reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, mines or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods:
Gain Arcane Surge after Spending a total of 461 Mana on
Upfront Costs and Effects of a Supported Skill

Arcane Surge grants 20% increased Cast Speed
Arcane Surge grants 30% increased Mana Regeneration rate
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Skills deal 35% more Spell Damage while you have Arcane Surge

name: The Annihilating Light
implicitMods: 7% chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Strike
explicitMods: Deal Triple Damage with Elemental Skills
flavourText: There is no force more destructive in the heavens
than the scintillating light of utter clarity.

socketedItems.secDescrText: An icy blast explodes around the caster, dealing cold damage to enemies, and leaving behind a whirling vortex which deals cold damage over time and chills enemies caught in it. If the caster targets near their Frostbolt projectiles, it will explode from a number of those projectiles instead, destroying them.
explicitMods: Deals 1593.8 Base Cold Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
50% more Area of Effect when Cast on Frostbolt
50% more Damage when Cast on Frostbolt
Can explode from up to 5 Frostbolt Projectiles
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a single eye projectile which constantly releases shard projectiles in a spiral. The shards will damage enemies they impact, dealing cold damage. The eye cannot damage enemies. When the eye dissipates or collides with terrain, it releases a faster spiral of extra shards.
explicitMods: Modifiers to number of Projectiles only apply to the final Spiral
Fires 10 Shard Projectiles in a Spiral when Projectile ends
Projectiles continuously gain Damage, up to 200% more Damage by the time they dissipate

name: Faithguard
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Maximum Energy Shield instead apply to Ward
flavourText: The priests of the Kalguur worshipped knowledge, not gods.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a short-lived flaming skull that rushes at nearby enemies and attacks them rapidly, converting all its physical damage to fire. Enemies will not directly engage these spirits, and can pass through them.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Bottled Faith
explicitMods: Consecrated Ground created by this Flask has Tripled Radius
Consecrated Ground created during Effect applies 10% increased Damage taken to Enemies
131% increased Critical Strike Chance against Enemies on Consecrated Ground during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A tourniquet for the soul, squeezing ethereal into physical.

explicitMods: 53% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Heartbound Loop
explicitMods: Minions have 10% increased Area of Effect
350 Physical Damage taken on Minion Death
flavourText: When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.

name: Lavianga's Spirit
explicitMods: Skills Cost no Mana during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "When the Ancestors fill your cup,
It is only good manners to drink your fill."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom
